return(function(...)local w,b do local r,n,y,i,c=math.floor,string.char,string.byte,tonumber,string.sub local function X(w,b)local n=0 for y=0,7,1 do local i=w/2+b/2 if i~=r(i)then n=n+2^y end w=r(w/2)b=r(b/2)end return n end local u,o="iiihhhiiiiihssss","\252\167\216\134\172\151\a\b\128\252\150\000\238\182\237\254\227\174\136\243\000\000\001\000\000\001\a\000\000\000__index\006\000\000\000__call\005\000\000\000__mod\005\000\000\000__mul"local W=65 local h=1064 local F=true local function Z(w)local Z={}for b=1,#w,2 do local r=c(w,b,b+1)Z[#Z+1]=i(r,16)end local A={}for w=0,3,1 do local b=Z[w+1]local r=((b-h)+256)%256 local n=y(u,w%16+1)local i=y(o,w%W+1)A[w+1]=X(X(r,n),i)end local g=((A[1]+A[2]*256)+A[3]*65536)+A[4]*16777216 local t={}for w=1,g,1 do local b=Z[w+4]if F and w%2==0 then b=(b%16)*16+r(b/16)end local i=((b-h)+256)%256 local c=(w-1)%16+1 local A=(w-1)%W+1 local g=y(u,c)local K=y(o,A)t[w]=n(X(X(i,g),K))end return table.concat(t)end local
